free_text: Angular distributions of protons scattered by 40Ar
nuclei with excitation of the 2+(1.46 MeV) and
3-(3.68 MeV) collective levels for incident energies
Rize University, Rize,Turkey
Ar gas contained in a cell at 2 atm
Four sets of detector telescopes were used.
Each of the telescopes comprised a 0.5-mm passing
detector (dE) and a stopping detector (E) with a
total depletion depth of 8 mm
Protons with a polarization of approximately
82% were accelerated by the 88-inch cyclotron
SD: page number in ref. was corrected.
OS. Minor BIB correction
